headings: 3-2 ADMINISTRATIVE REVIEW ON LABOR STANDARDS DISPUTES.
text: 1. DOL review. The  DOL  will  review  the  contract  administrator's  report  and  the arguments against the findings presented in the hearing request.  The DOL may affirm or modify the findings based upon the materials presented.  You will be notified in writing by the DOL of the results of its review.  If DOL concludes that violations have occurred, you will be given an opportunity to correct any underpayments or to request a hearing before a DOL Administrative Law Judge (ALJ).  (See DOL Regulations 29 CFR 5.11 (b) and 29 CFR Part 6, Rules of Practice forAdministrative Proceedings.)
